mdSummary:
# PopConfirm

Inline 'are you sure?' popover attached to a trigger.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/pop-confirm

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PopConfirm | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | ConfirmText | `string?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | CancelText | `string?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | IsDestructive | `bool` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | OnConfirm | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | OnCancel | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | Placement | `string` | `"top"` |  |
| PopConfirm | Icon | `Blazicons.SvgIcon?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (PopConfirm) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnConfirm` (`EventCallback`)
- `OnCancel` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor

```
